name: visual-comparison
description: Visual regression testing suite for the Practice Software Testing 'Toolshop' app — Playwright + TypeScript. Demonstrates automated detection of UI regressions by diffing a clean build against an intentionally buggy build.

scripts.docker:baseline: docker compose run --rm visual npm run baseline
scripts.docker:test: docker compose run --rm visual npm test
scripts.docker:bugs: docker compose run --rm -e BASE_URL=https://with-bugs.practicesoftwaretesting.com visual npm test
